title: FGT - Fabtech General Trading
content:
Fabtech Building Materials Trading LLC is conveniently located in Dubai Industrial Area with highly efficient loading facilities. With over 10 years’ operating experience, we provides a wide range of structural steel items to our clients.
Our team has experience in the procurement and supply of materials related to the needs of the oilfield industry and has vast and in-depth knowledge of the steel required for various applications which has fostered an excellent business relationship with the leading manufacturers and major supply houses of oilfield equipment around the world.
Handling Capacity

MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
